Custom T-Shirts for Business, Events & Personal Use

Premium Cotton T-Shirts with Custom Printing & Fast Turnaround

PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Custom T-Shirt Options: - Material Selection - Size Range - Color Options - Print Type - Quantity - Design Upload PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom T-Shirts for Business Uniforms & Event Apparel

Create professional custom t-shirts perfect for business uniforms, promotional events, fundraising campaigns, and personal use. Our premium cotton t-shirts feature high-quality screen printing and embroidery options designed to withstand frequent washing and daily wear.

Available in a full range of sizes from youth XS to adult 5XL, with over 50 color combinations to match your brand or event theme. Each custom t-shirt is printed using commercial-grade inks that resist fading and cracking, ensuring your design maintains its professional appearance through countless wears.

Choose from multiple printing methods including screen printing for bulk orders, direct-to-garment printing for detailed designs, and embroidery for premium corporate apparel. All custom t-shirts are produced using pre-shrunk cotton blends to maintain consistent sizing and fit.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom T-Shirt Materials for Durability & Comfort

Select from premium cotton blends designed for commercial use and frequent washing:

  • 100% Cotton: Classic breathable fabric ideal for casual wear and promotional events
  • Cotton-Poly Blend (50/50): Enhanced durability with moisture-wicking properties for active use
  • Tri-Blend: Soft, lightweight material combining cotton, polyester, and rayon for premium comfort
  • Performance Fabric: Moisture-wicking synthetic blend perfect for sports teams and outdoor events

All materials are pre-shrunk and tested for colorfastness to ensure your custom t-shirts maintain their professional appearance through commercial laundering and daily use.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom T-Shirt Printing & Finishing for Professional Results

Choose the printing method that best suits your custom t-shirt design and quantity:

  • Screen Printing: Cost-effective for bulk orders with solid colors and simple designs
  • Direct-to-Garment (DTG): Full-color printing perfect for detailed artwork and photo reproduction
  • Embroidery: Premium raised lettering ideal for corporate logos and professional uniforms
  • Heat Transfer Vinyl: Durable option for names, numbers, and small quantity orders

Additional finishing options include tagless printing, custom labels, and individual poly-bagging for retail or distribution purposes.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom T-Shirt Production & Turnaround Times

Production times for custom t-shirts vary based on printing method and quantity:

  • Screen Printing: 7-10 business days for quantities up to 500 pieces
  • Direct-to-Garment: 3-5 business days for orders up to 50 pieces
  • Embroidery: 10-14 business days including digitization and setup
  • Heat Transfer: 2-3 business days for rush orders and small quantities

Rush production is available for most orders with 24-48 hour turnaround options. Production begins after artwork approval and payment confirmation.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom T-Shirt Payment & Ordering Options

Flexible payment options available for custom t-shirt orders:

  • Credit Cards: Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover accepted
  • PayPal: Secure online payment processing for personal and business accounts
  • Net Terms: 30-day payment terms available for established business accounts
  • Purchase Orders: Accepted from schools, government agencies, and corporations

Bulk order discounts automatically applied at checkout. Custom quotes available for orders exceeding 500 pieces or specialty requirements.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom T-Shirt Shipping & Delivery Options

Reliable shipping options for custom t-shirt delivery:

  • Standard Shipping: 5-7 business days via UPS Ground or FedEx Ground
  • Express Shipping: 2-3 business days for urgent deliveries
  • Overnight Shipping: Next business day delivery available for rush orders
  • Local Delivery: Available within 50 miles of production facilities

All custom t-shirts are carefully packaged to prevent damage during transit. Tracking information provided for all shipments. Bulk orders may ship via freight for cost efficiency.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom T-Shirt Applications for Business & Events

Popular applications for custom printed t-shirts:

  • Corporate Uniforms: Professional employee apparel with company branding
  • Promotional Events: Trade shows, festivals, and marketing campaigns
  • Sports Teams: Team uniforms, practice gear, and fan merchandise
  • Fundraising: Non-profit organizations and school fundraising campaigns
  • Special Events: Weddings, family reunions, and celebration apparel
  • Retail Merchandise: Custom branded apparel for resale

Custom t-shirts provide cost-effective branding solutions for businesses and organizations of all sizes, with professional results suitable for both indoor and outdoor use.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom T-Shirt Artwork Requirements & Design Guidelines

Artwork specifications for optimal custom t-shirt printing results:

  • File Formats: Vector files (AI, EPS, PDF) preferred; high-resolution raster files (PNG, JPG) accepted at 300 DPI minimum
  • Color Mode: CMYK for full-color printing; Pantone colors for screen printing
  • Design Size: Maximum 12" x 16" print area for adult sizes
  • Text Requirements: Minimum 8-point font size for legibility

Free design consultation available to optimize artwork for your chosen printing method. Professional design services offered for custom logo creation and artwork enhancement.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom T-Shirts Through Our Shirtspot Partnership Today

Ready to create professional custom t-shirts for your business, event, or organization? Our partnership with Shirtspot.com provides access to premium apparel options with the quality and service you expect from Banners.com.

Get started with your custom t-shirt order and save 15% by using promo code BANS15 at checkout. Our team of graphic design professionals will ensure your custom apparel meets your exact specifications.

Why choose our custom t-shirt services:

  • 100% in-house customer service with professional graphic designers
  • Fast turnaround times from 2-14 business days
  • Premium materials and commercial-grade printing
  • Live order tracking throughout production

Questions about custom t-shirt options, pricing, or artwork requirements? Contact our customer service team at 866.419.7446 for personalized assistance with your order.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom T-Shirt Frequently Asked Questions

What is the minimum order quantity for custom t-shirts?

Minimum order quantities vary by printing method. Direct-to-garment printing has no minimum, while screen printing typically requires 12 pieces per design/color combination.

How long do custom t-shirts take to produce?

Production times range from 2-14 business days depending on printing method and quantity. Rush production is available for most orders.

What file formats do you accept for custom t-shirt artwork?

We accept vector files (AI, EPS, PDF) and high-resolution raster files (PNG, JPG) at 300 DPI minimum. Free artwork consultation is available.

Do custom t-shirts shrink after washing?

All t-shirt materials are pre-shrunk to minimize shrinkage. We recommend washing in cold water and air drying for best results.

Can I get a sample before placing a large custom t-shirt order?

Yes, sample t-shirts are available for most materials and printing methods. Contact customer service for sample pricing and availability.

What printing method works best for detailed custom t-shirt designs?

Direct-to-garment printing provides the best results for detailed artwork, photographs, and designs with multiple colors or gradients.
